# sapho

> A plain-files source of truth for your projects. One canonical markdown file per product;
> every AI you work with reads it before generating anything. No server, no account — a
> schema, a few conventions, and a git repo you own.

## Install

- [Installation spec for AI agents](/install.md): capability-detecting setup instructions
  for agentic tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) and GitHub-connected chat apps (ChatGPT,
  claude.ai). If a user asked you to "set up sapho," read that file and follow it.
